title: Grailzee Cycle Shortlist CSV v1
description: Column contract for cycle_shortlist_<cycle_id>.csv. One row per (reference x bucket). Reference-level fields repeat across rows for the same reference. Header row required; column order fixed. Captured from build_shortlist.py output as canonical authority (30 columns, Wave 1.1).

shape.description: One row per (reference x bucket). Reference-level fields repeat across rows.

columns.description: Ordered column inventory. Position in array equals column position in CSV header.

columns.name: brand
columns.description: Brand name. Repeats across all bucket rows for the same reference.

columns.name: reference
columns.description: Reference number (canonical form). Repeats across bucket rows.

columns.name: model
columns.description: Model name from name_cache. Repeats across bucket rows.

columns.name: dial_numerals
columns.description: Keying axis. Canonical dial numerals label (e.g. Arabic, Roman, No Numerals). Case-preserved from ingest.

columns.name: auction_type
columns.description: Keying axis. Auction type, lowercased (nr or res).

columns.name: dial_color
columns.description: Keying axis. Canonical dial color (e.g. black, white, unknown). Case-preserved from ingest.

columns.name: named_special
columns.description: Named-special metadata (e.g. Panda, Tiffany). Empty string when none.

columns.name: signal
columns.description: Bucket signal label: Strong, Normal, Reserve, Careful, Pass, Low data. Always present; Low data when volume < min_sales_for_scoring.

columns.name: median
columns.description: Hammer price median for this bucket. Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: max_buy_nr
columns.description: Max buy price targeting median profit, No Reserve. Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: max_buy_res
columns.description: Max buy price targeting median profit, Reserve. Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: st_pct
columns.description: Sell-through percentage for this bucket. Empty when no data.

columns.name: volume
columns.description: Number of sales in this bucket. Always present including Low data buckets.

columns.name: risk_nr
columns.description: Historical probability of a sub-breakeven No Reserve hammer. Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: capital_required_nr
columns.description: Capital required at max_buy_nr (includes fees). Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: capital_required_res
columns.description: Capital required at max_buy_res (includes fees). Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: expected_net_at_median_nr
columns.description: Expected net profit selling at median from No Reserve position. Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: expected_net_at_median_res
columns.description: Expected net profit selling at median from Reserve position. Empty when signal=Low data.

columns.name: trend_signal
columns.description: Cross-cycle trend direction label. Empty on single-report run.

columns.name: trend_median_change
columns.description: Absolute median change from prior period. Empty on single-report run.

columns.name: trend_median_pct
columns.description: Percentage median change from prior period. Empty on single-report run.

columns.name: momentum_score
columns.description: Momentum score (integer in practice). Repeats across bucket rows. Empty when no trend data.

columns.name: momentum_label
columns.description: Momentum label (e.g. Heating, Cooling). Repeats across bucket rows. Empty when no trend data.

columns.name: confidence_trades
columns.description: Count of Vardalux trades on this reference. Repeats across bucket rows. Empty when no trades.

columns.name: confidence_profitable
columns.description: Count of profitable trades. Repeats across bucket rows. Empty when no trades.

columns.name: confidence_win_rate
columns.description: Win rate as percentage (0-100). Repeats across bucket rows. Empty when no trades.

columns.name: confidence_avg_roi
columns.description: Average ROI percentage across trades. Repeats across bucket rows. Empty when no trades.

columns.name: confidence_avg_premium
columns.description: Average premium over median across trades. Repeats. Empty when no trades or insufficient data.

columns.name: confidence_last_trade
columns.description: ISO date of most recent trade (YYYY-MM-DD). Repeats. Empty when no trades.

columns.name: keep
columns.description: Strategy session marker. Always empty at CSV generation; filled during keep/strike pass.
